regions.text: This map gives a picture of the population in the different states of the United States of America today. The scale of the map is the same as that used for Europe on page 9. If you look at the two you will see that the U.S.A. is not much smaller than all of Europe.
scale: one inch on this line represents a mile. The scale used is one inch to a mile. look: take a look.
FUTURE: will look. PRESENT: look(s). PAST: looked.
